data.body:
[On-Time Gift Notice]

Sensei, here's a special gift for you in celebration of the 'Cyber New Year March' event story release!

🎁On-Time Gift: Pyroxene x600
🗓️Event Period:
6/25 (Tue) After Maintenance ~ 7/2 (Tue) 2:59 PM (UTC)
